title: draba aizoides var. longirostra
intro: Draba aizoides var. longirostra, also known as the Long-beaked Whitlow Grass or Draba longirostra, is a rare, annual plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Draba aizoides var. longirostra include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Draba aizoides var. longirostra typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
